summary: Frontend-only test of the new inline edit feature in the PDF import preview (programmation artistique) + benchmark Nicolas regression check. All 6 scenarios pass. NOTE: /tmp/prog-mai.pdf mentioned in the review did NOT exist on the pod, so /api/parse-programmation was MOCKED via page.route to return 25 fake dates for 2026-05. UI/UX flow of the edit-inline feature is fully verified.
action_items: The file /tmp/prog-mai.pdf mentioned in the review was NOT present on the pod. A minimal valid PDF was uploaded and the parse-programmation response was MOCKED with 25 dates via page.route. To reproduce with the real parser on a real PDF, the user must re-upload the file. Consider committing a fixture PDF under /app/backend/tests/fixtures/ for reproducible testing.
critical_code_review_comments: programmation-import.js is 523 lines — approaching the recommended 700-line soft-limit; consider splitting rendering (renderStep1/renderStep2/renderItemRow) into a dedicated view module.
The inline edit path stores state in ad-hoc fields (_editing, _editedDate, _userEdited) on shared items — a dedicated editState object would be safer.

The edit-save handler reads DOM values but doesn't validate the date (e.g., empty date, invalid format). Currently a blank date falls back to the old dateKey, which is fine, but a malformed value from a non-native date input browser could bypass this.
No visible dedicated data-testid attributes on the new elements (edit-open / edit-save / edit-cancel / edit-date etc. rely on CSS classes). Consider adding data-testid for long-term test stability.
seed_data_creation: None — the parse-programmation API was MOCKED, so no data was persisted to the backend. No cleanup needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The /tmp/prog-mai.pdf test fixture doesn't exist on the pod. If needed, mock POST /api/parse-programmation with 25 dates or upload a real Palace Comedy programming PDF. All edit-inline logic (open/cancel/save with date change and artistes change) is verified working. Benchmark Nicolas fiche => KPI #kpiTotalHT = '5 775,00 €' confirmed intact.
verified_scenarios: Onglet Calendrier -> Importer programmation PDF -> file upload -> Analyser -> 25 dates détectées, 51 artistes, 50 créneaux
Chaque ligne a un bouton ✏️ Modifier (25/25)
Click Modifier ouvre un formulaire inline avec 4 champs (date type=date, artistes, créneaux, notes)
Bouton Annuler referme l'éditeur sans changement
Modification date 2026-05-01 -> 2026-05-23 + artistes 'NewArtist1, NewArtist2, NewArtist3' + Save -> ligne re-rendered avec la nouvelle date et les nouveaux artistes affichés
